This auto-match compares every hardcoded course in the current Green River transfer tracks against the major's tracked Green River classes and keeps the track with the highest concrete course overlap.
Use the remaining major-specific checklist items to add the classes that AA-DTA does not cover by itself.

whyThisTrack: AA-DTA has the strongest direct overlap with the current degree-specific Green River class list, including BIOL& 211, BIOL& 212, BIOL& 213.

This auto-match compares every hardcoded course in the current Green River transfer tracks against the major's tracked Green River classes and keeps the track with the highest concrete course overlap.
Use the remaining major-specific checklist items to add the classes that AA-DTA does not cover by itself.
